name: Workspace Concurrent Edit Safety
description: Test that when multiple tools attempt to edit the same file simultaneously, the system: 1) uses file locking or serialization, 2) prevents lost updates, 3) provides consistent read-after-write semantics, and 4) handles the race condition gracefully.

files.src/shared.rs:
// Shared resource that multiple tools might edit.
pub const SHARED_CONFIG: &str = "default_value";
